segments.caption: The video opens with a woman wearing a denim shirt, large rectangular glasses, and gold hoop earrings, standing in front of a minimalist white wardrobe with gold handles. To her left is a beige ceramic vase on a dark surface. She speaks directly to the camera, using expressive hand gestures, including raising her hands with palms up and clasping her fingers together. Midway through the segment, a title card appears with the text 'CIARA O'DOHERTY FASHION & LIFESTYLE' over a collage of three images showing her in different stylish outfits. The video then returns to her speaking, and a YouTube-style 'SUBSCRIBE' button with her channel name and a bell icon appears in the lower-left corner, which she gestures toward. The lighting is bright and even, emphasizing a clean, modern aesthetic. Her demeanor is engaging and conversational, suggesting she is introducing or concluding a fashion or lifestyle segment.

segments.caption: The video opens with Ciara O'Doherty, a woman with dark hair pulled back, wearing a blue denim shirt, large rectangular glasses, and gold hoop earrings, speaking expressively in a minimalist indoor setting with white cabinetry and a beige vase in the background. She gestures animatedly as she introduces the topic. The screen then transitions to a split-screen format, with Ciara on the right continuing to speak and gesture, while the left side displays a sequence of fashion images showcasing various women carrying different styles of tan and olive suede handbags in diverse outfits and settings—ranging from streetwear to more formal ensembles. The images highlight the versatility of the bags, shown being worn as shoulder bags, crossbody bags, and even with decorative accessories like scarves and charms. The sequence includes close-ups of the bags and their textures, as well as full-body shots of the models in urban and indoor environments. Toward the end, a title card appears in the top left corner with the text 'SUEDE HANDBAGS' over a collage of the previously shown images, reinforcing the theme. Ciara continues to speak with enthusiasm, maintaining eye contact and using hand gestures to emphasize her points.

segments.caption: The video opens with Ciara O'Doherty, a woman with dark hair pulled back, wearing a blue denim shirt, large rectangular glasses, and gold hoop earrings, speaking expressively in a minimalist indoor setting with white cabinetry and a beige vase in the background. She gestures with her hands as she introduces a brown suede handbag, holding it up to showcase its design. The screen then splits into a side-by-side format: on the right, Ciara continues to speak and gesture while holding the bag, and on the left, a series of images appear showing different women modeling the same or similar suede handbags in various outfits and settings. The first model wears a white coat and carries the bag over her shoulder, followed by another woman in a striped shirt and wide-leg pants, also carrying the bag casually. The sequence transitions to a different brown suede handbag with a gold clasp, shown first on a woman in a green jacket and then on a model in a white turtleneck, emphasizing the bag’s versatility. Ciara continues to narrate and gesture throughout, maintaining eye contact with the camera, while the split-screen visuals highlight the handbags’ styling potential across different looks and environments.

segments.caption: The video opens with a split-screen format, featuring Ciara O'Doherty on the right side, speaking expressively with hand gestures in a minimalist indoor setting with white cabinetry and a beige vase in the background. She wears a blue denim shirt, large rectangular glasses, and gold hoop earrings. On the left side, a fashion runway sequence showcases models in flowing, ruffled mocha-toned outfits, including sheer dresses and matching boots, walking down a runway with an audience seated along the sides. The scene transitions to a static collage titled '2025 COLOUR TRENDS: MOCHA MOUSSE' by @CIARAODOHERTY, displaying coordinated brown and beige garments such as blazers, dresses, and handbags, with Ciara continuing her commentary. The left side then shifts to a new collage titled '2025 COLOUR TRENDS: BUTTER YELLOW', featuring soft yellow and cream outfits including cardigans, dresses, and trousers, with Ciara reacting and gesturing. This is followed by real-life street-style images of women wearing butter-yellow ensembles—such as a long yellow dress with a croissant, a yellow cardigan with striped shorts, and a yellow knit dress with a brown jacket—while Ciara continues to speak and gesture animatedly. The lighting remains bright and even throughout, emphasizing the colors and textures of the clothing, and the overall atmosphere is informative and stylish, focusing on upcoming fashion color trends.

segments.caption: The video segment features Ciara O'Doherty, a woman with dark hair pulled back, wearing a blue denim shirt, large rectangular glasses, and gold hoop earrings, speaking expressively with hand gestures in a minimalist indoor setting with white cabinetry and a beige vase in the background. On the left side of the split-screen, a dynamic montage of fashion images showcases the color trend 'Chartreuse Green' through various high-fashion and street-style looks. The sequence begins with a model in a lime green coat and white pants holding a red handbag, transitions to a model in a long olive green coat with a chartreuse scarf and sunglasses on a runway, then to a woman in a flowing chartreuse dress holding a blue tassel bag. The montage continues with a model in a long chartreuse dress with a hooded coat, followed by a woman in a chartreuse slip dress holding a red cocktail glass, and then a woman in a chartreuse ruffled dress stepping out of a black limousine. The sequence includes a model in a draped chartreuse satin dress, and another in a chartreuse wrap dress with fringe details. The segment then shifts to a new color trend, 'Tangerine Dream,' with a static collage displaying orange fashion items including a tank top, dress, handbag, sneakers, cardigan, and sandals, accompanied by the text '2025 COLOUR TRENDS: TANGERINE DREAM' and '@CIARAODOHERTY'. The final image shows a model on a runway in an off-the-shoulder tangerine gown, with a Pantone color swatch labeled 'PANTONE 15-1335 Tangelo' in the top left corner. Throughout, Ciara O'Doherty gestures and speaks, likely commenting on the fashion trends displayed.

segments.caption: The video segment features a split-screen format, with Ciara O'Doherty on the right side, consistently present throughout, speaking expressively with hand gestures while wearing a blue denim shirt, large rectangular glasses, and gold hoop earrings, set against a minimalist indoor backdrop with white cabinetry and a beige vase. On the left side, a dynamic montage of fashion images showcases various women modeling outfits in vibrant orange and tangerine hues, reflecting the 'TANGERINE DREAM' color trend. The sequence begins with a woman in an orange shirt and shorts over a crochet bra, followed by a close-up of an orange shirt, then a woman in an orange shirt with jeans, and another in an orange dress with a green bag. The montage continues with a woman in an orange dress on a city street, a woman in an orange shirt with jeans and orange heels, a woman in a ruffled orange dress with a striped bag, a woman in an orange wrap dress with blue heels, a woman in a red lace dress, a woman in a yellow shirt with an orange scarf, a woman in an orange outfit with a red bandana, and finally a woman in a one-shoulder orange dress. The images vary in setting—indoor, outdoor, street, and studio—highlighting the versatility of the color. The segment concludes with a close-up of an orange satin shirt with a matching crocodile-textured handbag, emphasizing the trend’s luxurious appeal. The overall narrative flows as a visual exploration of the 'TANGERINE DREAM' color trend, with Ciara O'Doherty providing commentary and context.

segments.caption: The video features Ciara O'Doherty, a woman with dark hair pulled back, wearing a blue denim shirt, large rectangular glasses, and gold hoop earrings, speaking expressively with hand gestures in a minimalist indoor setting with white cabinetry and a beige vase in the background. Throughout the segment, she discusses fashion trends, particularly focusing on 'Polished Boho' for 2025. On the left side of the screen, a series of images and collages appear, showcasing various fashion looks. The first is a static collage titled '2025 TRENDS POLISHED BOHO' by @CIARAODOHERTY, displaying denim and floral pieces, including a denim vest, flared jeans, and ruffled skirts. This transitions into a runway image of a model in a mustard ruffled dress with a high neck and sunglasses, followed by street-style images of women in bohemian-inspired outfits—such as a grey ruffled top with a scarf, a brown leather jacket over a lace top, and a black jumpsuit with a statement necklace. The sequence continues with a model in a white lace dress with a brown belt, then a woman in a pink ruffled blouse with jeans, and later a collage of models in cream and beige ensembles with lace and ruffles. The final image shows a model in a mustard suede jacket over a blue top and a long ruffled skirt, walking on a reflective runway. Ciara gestures animatedly, emphasizing points as she speaks, maintaining eye contact with the camera and using her hands to illustrate her commentary on the evolving boho aesthetic.

segments.caption: The video segment features Ciara O'Doherty, a woman with dark hair pulled back, wearing a blue denim shirt, large rectangular glasses, and gold hoop earrings, speaking expressively with hand gestures in a minimalist indoor setting with white cabinetry and a beige vase in the background. On the left side of the screen, a dynamic collage of denim fashion trends for 2025 is displayed, beginning with a title card reading '2025 TRENDS DENIM TRENDS' and showcasing various denim garments including vests, pants, jackets, and a cap, with a model in a white tee and dark denim trousers. The collage transitions through multiple street-style and studio images illustrating denim layering and styling: a woman in a striped blazer over a denim shirt with wide-leg jeans; another in a brown suede blazer over a denim shirt with jeans; a mirror selfie of a woman in a dark leather jacket over denim with leopard-print boots; a woman in a fringed suede jacket with cream trousers and brown boots; a close-up of a studded suede jacket; a woman in a yellow patterned denim skirt with cowboy boots; a woman in a beige varsity jacket with white shorts and cowboy boots; a woman in a denim dress with a brown handbag; a woman in a brown blazer with a white ruffled skirt; and finally, a model in a denim shirt dress. Throughout, Ciara gestures and speaks, likely commenting on the denim trends shown, maintaining a consistent presence on the right side of the frame.

active_entities.Ciara O'Doherty: A woman with dark hair pulled back, wearing a blue denim shirt, large rectangular glasses, and gold hoop earrings, speaking expressively with hand gestures in a minimalist indoor setting with white cabinetry and a beige vase in the background.

discovered_new_entities.2025 TRENDS DENIM TRENDS Collage: A dynamic collage on the left side of the frame showcasing various denim garments including vests, pants, jackets, and a cap, with a model in a white tee and dark denim trousers, and text reading '2025 TRENDS DENIM TRENDS' and '@CIARAODOHERTY'. The collage transitions through multiple images of women in denim outfits, including layered looks with blazers, suede jackets, and cowboy boots, highlighting diverse styling options for denim in 2025.

segments.caption: The video segment features a split-screen format, with Ciara O'Doherty on the right side, consistently speaking and gesturing expressively in a minimalist indoor setting with white cabinetry and a beige vase in the background. She wears a blue denim shirt, large rectangular glasses, and gold hoop earrings, maintaining a professional yet approachable demeanor. On the left side, a dynamic montage of fashion images cycles through various Western and bohemian-inspired looks, showcasing models and street-style individuals in cowboy hats, fringe jackets, cow-print garments, plaid shirts, and denim ensembles. The outfits include a paisley blouse with a tan skirt, a brown fringed dress with a cowboy hat, a cow-print jacket with white pants, a brown shearling jacket with a cow-print skirt, a plaid shirt with black pants, a light blue pleated dress in a barn setting, a black wrap dress with a turquoise belt buckle, a brown fringe jacket with jeans, a white embroidered jacket with blue jeans, a brown ruffled shirt with jeans and cowboy boots, a green top with white boots, and a black shirt dress with red cowboy boots. Each image highlights distinct textures, accessories, and styling elements such as belts, handbags, and layered pieces, emphasizing a cohesive Western-chic aesthetic. The lighting remains bright and even throughout, with the left-side images varying from runway settings to urban streets and rustic barns, while Ciara’s side maintains a clean, neutral backdrop. The sequence flows smoothly, with each new image on the left appearing as Ciara continues her commentary, suggesting a thematic discussion on Western fashion trends.

active_entities.Ciara O'Doherty: A woman with dark hair pulled back, wearing a blue denim shirt, large rectangular glasses, and gold hoop earrings, speaking expressively with hand gestures in a minimalist indoor setting with white cabinetry and a beige vase in the background.

segments.caption: The video features Ciara O'Doherty, a woman with dark hair pulled back, wearing a blue denim shirt, large rectangular glasses, and gold hoop earrings, speaking expressively with hand gestures in a minimalist indoor setting with white cabinetry and a beige vase in the background. On the left side of the screen, a dynamic split-screen montage showcases various fashion looks, primarily focusing on bold, structured, and avant-garde styles. The sequence begins with a model in a black turtleneck and oversized blazer with gloves, followed by a model in a dramatic black suit with a wide-brimmed hat and a ruffled black scarf, walking on a runway. Next, a model with a sleek bun wears a black leather jacket over a lime green ruffled top, accessorized with large gold and black statement earrings. This is followed by a woman in a black dress with gold buttons and a black headpiece, then a woman in a beige blazer over a white mini dress, standing in front of a blue door. The montage continues with a woman in a plaid blazer and turtleneck with sheer tights, then a woman in a white blazer with black gloves and a black scalloped skirt, standing outside a Chanel store. A model in a black top and skirt with a black hat appears, followed by a woman in a grey blazer with a black skirt and a black hat, walking on a cobblestone street. The sequence includes a woman in a black sleeveless top and black pants with a black handbag, then a woman in a black blazer and black pants with a white shirt, walking on a city sidewalk. The final look features a woman in a black sweater and black pants with a chunky chain necklace, walking along a stone building with a green awning. Throughout, Ciara O'Doherty gestures and speaks, likely commenting on the fashion trends displayed, emphasizing structured silhouettes, bold accessories, and monochromatic elegance.

segments.caption: The video opens with a split-screen format: on the left, a dynamic montage of street-style fashion images cycles through various women in chic, monochromatic outfits—featuring black pinstripe blazers, one-shoulder tops, white trousers, and sleek black suits—each carrying designer handbags and posing confidently in urban settings. On the right, Ciara O'Doherty, wearing a blue denim shirt, large rectangular glasses, and gold hoop earrings, speaks expressively to the camera, using hand gestures to emphasize her points. The background behind her is a minimalist indoor space with white cabinetry and a beige vase. As the montage progresses, the left side transitions to a full-screen view of Ciara, who continues her commentary with animated gestures. A YouTube-style 'SUBSCRIBE' button overlay appears in the lower-left corner, displaying her name 'CIARA O'DOHERTY' and the tagline 'Fashion & Style' alongside a circular profile picture and a bell icon. The lighting remains bright and even throughout, maintaining a clean, professional aesthetic. The overall narrative flows from showcasing diverse fashion looks to a direct address by Ciara, culminating in a call to action for viewers to subscribe.

active_entities.Ciara O'Doherty: A woman with dark hair pulled back, wearing a blue denim shirt, large rectangular glasses, and gold hoop earrings, speaking expressively with hand gestures in a minimalist indoor setting with white cabinetry and a beige vase in the background.

segments.caption: The video segment presents a dynamic montage of a woman walking through various urban and park-like settings, showcasing different stylish outfits and accessories. The sequence begins with her in a beige blazer over a black dress, carrying a black handbag, walking past a stone wall and black metal fence. The scene transitions to her in a black coat with a white top, holding a red coffee cup and a brown tote bag, walking near a modern building with a glass facade. Next, she appears in a grey blazer over a black mini dress, carrying a black handbag, walking past a classic black door with a wrought iron fence. The setting shifts to a park with fallen autumn leaves, where she wears a beige trench coat over a ribbed dress, carrying a black handbag, and later a grey coat over a black dress, also with a black handbag. The final scenes show her in a beige trench coat with a black beret, walking past a stone building with large windows. Throughout the video, a consistent overlay appears with the text 'Thanks For Watching', a 'Subscribe' button with a bell icon, and 'MORE TO WATCH' with two empty video thumbnails, suggesting this is an end screen for a fashion or lifestyle video. The lighting is natural and soft, emphasizing the textures of her clothing and the urban environments, while the camera follows her movements smoothly, capturing the elegance and fluidity of her walk.
